title: Valley-only rivers + batch all water into one mesh + FPS profiling
description: Rivers looked like dark slabs down steep slopes and 58 separate transparent meshes tanked perf. Filter river cells to gentle slopes (valley floors), merge all water (static + rivers) into a single MeshInstance/material using the blue shader, and add on-screen FPS + draw-call readout to water_test.

title: Fix water shaders: blue palette + depth-driven color + fresnel
description: water_static.gdshader and common include: realistic blue shallow/deep, drive from vertex G depth not shore distance, add cheap fresnel. Potato-friendly.

title: Fix water_static_mesh flat surface + depth in vertex G
description: build_from_cells uses flat water elevation (not terrain_h+0.1) and encodes depth=level-terrain in vertex color G. Fixes flat blocks.

title: Rewire WaterSystem.generate_water_bodies to use HydrologyMap
description: Replace disconnected detectors with single hydrology pass. Add get_water_level_at(x,z).

title: Create HydrologyMap (priority-flood + flow accumulation)
description: New water/hydrology_map.gd: fill depressions, D8 flow on filled surface, flow accumulation, extract lake cells + river polylines + swamp cells. Optional downsample for big maps.

title: Unified hydrology water system
description: Replace five disconnected water detectors with a single hydrology pass (priority-flood + flow accumulation) and fix flat/blue rendering. See plan.
notes: River rendering + perf follow-up after first hydrology landing

title: Water System: Core Infrastructure (Phase 1)
description:
Create foundational water system components:
- WaterSystem manager (water/water_system.gd)
- WaterBodyData resource (water/water_body_data.gd)
- water_map integration in HeightmapStorage
- water_common.gdshaderinc shared shader code

This enables all future water features.

title: Update water_test scene + remove water_flow_simulator
description: water_test.gd: use unified generate_water_bodies, drop flow-sim path. Delete water/water_flow_simulator.gd (superseded).

title: Water System: Swamp Classification
description:
DEFERRED - Implement later if needed.

Swamp detection criteria:
- Slope < 5 degrees (flat terrain)
- Elevation < 30% normalized
- Adjacent to river or in depression
- Vegetation density > 50%

Requires ClearingSystem integration for vegetation data.
Uses water_static.gdshader with murky green parameters.

title: Water System: Shore Blending
description:
Add visual shore blending to all water types:
- Calculate shore distance per vertex during mesh generation
- Pass as vertex attribute
- Alpha fade in fragment shader
- Mud/sand texture transition near water edges

This prevents hard water edges that break immersion.

title: Water System: Coastal Zones (Phase 2b)
description:
Implement coastal water generation:
- Flood fill from map edges inward to sea_level
- Generate shoreline polygon
- Coastal mesh strips along map edges
- water_coastal.gdshader with waves and foam
- Beach transition zone (wet/dry sand blend)

Configurable: which map edges are ocean (bitmask).

title: Water System: Ponds & Lakes (Phase 2a)
description:
Implement static water body generation:
- Depression detection algorithm (find heightmap minima, flood fill to pour point)
- Pond classification (area < 2500 m^2)
- Lake classification (area >= 2500 m^2)
- Mesh generation for static water bodies
- water_static.gdshader for gentle ripples

Algorithm: flood fill from local minima upward until pour point found.

title: Water System: Gameplay API (Phase 3)
description:
Expose water info to gameplay systems:
- is_water(world_x, world_z) -> bool
- get_water_type(world_x, world_z) -> WaterType
- get_water_depth(world_x, world_z) -> float
- get_flow(world_x, world_z) -> Vector2

All O(1) lookups via pre-computed water_map grid.
Integration with GameplayGrid for movement modifiers.
close_reason: Complete: GameplayGrid now uses WaterSystem for water detection. Added water query methods (is_water, get_water_depth, get_water_flow, is_wadeable, requires_boat).
